title: Evangelion 222 Questions
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.22 Questions (MAJOR SPOILERS!!!!!!!!)             Quote Post by Zeruel » Mon Mar 15, 2010 2:46 am If you look on m profile you'll know its my b-day and was wondering as a present you guys could tell me what the hell did I just watch?? I don't understand the new angel count who kaworu is what eva unit 6 is mari is what happens in the end with unit 00 unit 1 unit 2 and zeruel and the whole 3I thing?

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Mon Mar 15, 2010 2:59 am basically zeruel is after lilith like all other angels abd they ahve changed his appearence as you have seen. they have ubered up zeruel and the AT field it produces is super strong, so strong no eva could penitrate without exessive force, unit 00 is sent in and Mari hijacks unit 2. mari notices the extemety of the situation at hand so she activates the secret mode known as "the bisto" (the beast) which removes all restraints on unit 2 and shows its true form which maximizes unit 02's power, which is just enough to tear through the at field of the angel and allow unit 00 to put an N2 mine on the other side, obviously it wasnt enough, unit 00 and 02 are taken out. zeruel senses the energy of lilith in Rei and absorbs unit 00 along with Rei. zeruel does ass he/she does in the original series and attacks nerv. Shinji blows in and saves the day, goes beserk in an attempt to reach into zeruel's core to save Rei, 3rd impact begins. kaworu penitrates unit 01 while activating 3rd impact and (possibly) destory's unit 01's core in the process. thats basically what i understood and saw in a nutshell

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 15, 2010 3:51 am Evangelion 2.02? Is there such a thing?

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Mon Mar 15, 2010 4:02 am Reichu wrote: Evangelion 2.02? Is there such a thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 15, 2010 4:04 am I asked if there was a 2. 02 . So, the answer would be "No" rather than "Yes". (BTW, please try to improve your posting style. For example, your follow-up to the OP is extremely difficult to read.)

[]:             Quote Post by KaaVI » Mon Mar 15, 2010 5:10 am Reichu wrote: I asked if there was a 2. 02 . So, the answer would be "No" rather than "Yes". (BTW, please try to improve your posting style. For example, your follow-up to the OP is extremely difficult to read.)

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruel » Mon Mar 15, 2010 12:32 pm How does Eva 01 attacking Zeruel initiate 3rd Impact? And what is the official numbering of the angels from Adam-Zeruel? (changed the numbering of the Header) (Where's my happy birthday's)

[]:             Quote Post by Octahedron » Mon Mar 15, 2010 12:53 pm Presumably the same way Angels getting into contact with Lilith would. Rei has Lilith's soul and Shogoki is made from Lilith's body, so Rei+01=Lilith's soul+Lilith's body=complete Lilith, and Lilith+Angel=3rd impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 15, 2010 2:19 pm Zeruel wrote: And what is the official numbering of the angels from Adam-Zeruel?

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruel » Thu Mar 18, 2010 7:10 pm Finally why does Kaworu refer to (Im assuming) Gendo as father?? or possible Fuyutsuki as father?? Is Kaworu to Adam/Gendo or Fuyutsuki, as Rei is to Lilith/Rei?? Im sure this is all fan speculation on the net but is there any concrete evidence? Im assuming if he was talking to Gendo that he is a clone of Gendo/Adam? Or is it that he thinks of himself as a brother to Shinji and instinctively refers to Gendo as father because he is Shinjis father?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 18, 2010 7:32 pm Zeruel wrote: Finally why does Kaworu refer to (Im assuming) Gendo as father?? or possible Fuyutsuki as father??

[]:             Quote Post by Zeruel » Thu Mar 18, 2010 8:23 pm Thanks
